Themed error

Source: R/vw_message.R
vw_error.Rd

Wrapper around cli::cli_abort() that applies VW_THEME and reports the call from the correct frame. Accepts the same msg conventions as vw_message(): a plain string, a named character vector (for bullet-style bodies), or inline cli markup.

Usage

vw_error(msg, ..., call = rlang::caller_env())

Arguments

msg

A character string or named character vector passed to cli::cli_abort(). Use names "i", "x", "v", ">" for bullet formatting, e.g. c("Something failed.", "i" = "Check {.arg x}.").

...

Additional arguments forwarded to cli::cli_abort() (e.g. class, call, .internal).

call

Caller enviroment (rlang::caller_env())

Author

Serena Defina, 2026.

On this page

Developed by Serena Defina, Ryan Muetzel.
